title: Pizza Night!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Dad just brought the box inside!
It’s hot and smells so good!
I slide right into my chair—
My socks went *zoom* on wood!

[chorus]
Pizza night! Pizza night!
Cheesy, saucy, round and bright!
Grab a plate and hold it tight—
Pizza night!

[verse 2]
One big bite, my face is glad!
Garlic makes my nose go *boop*!
I lick my fingers—yum, yum, yum—
Then I do a happy loop!

[chorus]
Pizza night! Pizza night!
Cheesy, saucy, round and bright!
Grab a plate and hold it tight—
Pizza night!

[ending]
My tummy’s full, I’m warm and slow,
I lean on Dad and sigh.
Pizza night was just so great…
Can we do it tomorrow night?
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, guitar, bass, and drums, 107 BPM, warm swaying groove, gentle but full, cozy beat, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The kitchen clock strikes 5:30, and the oven timer dings—your nose catches the buttery garlic scent of the takeout box landing on the counter, and you shriek "PIZZA NIGHT!" while launching off the linoleum, socks skidding, arms windmilling into a full-body hug around Dad’s legs.
cover_description: A kid in striped pajamas skids across the kitchen in socks, arms out like an airplane, mouth wide open in a joyful scream, while a steaming pizza box hovers above Dad’s grinning hands.
